Preflight.DistinctReqIdGuarantee: ReqId == _id verified on 1,000 sampled docs; _id is system-unique on all backends, so distinct ReqId == distinct _id == document count even where the ReqId index is non-unique.

ReuseCheck.Detail: tasks=81617 (successful=81591), created=81617, ready=81617, closed=81617, checkedOut=326430. No-reuse holds when created>=successfulTasks (one fresh connection per completed Task) and created≈closed (no leak). created<successfulTasks is reuse (suspectedReuseEvents=0); created<totalTasks here is 0 Tasks that failed at server-selection BEFORE opening a connection, not reuse. Per-Task pool check-outs (≈4×tasks) are normal within a Task.
